The use Of apprentices shall not be
prohibited.


The foreman shall be the agent Of
the employer.


AL workmen are at liberty to work
for whomsoever they see fit.


AL employers are at liberty to en-
ploy and discharge whomsoever they
see At.


The last clause IL a plain declara-
ton for the open shop. Union men
have always contested that sue
cessful movement to establish the
open shop meant the end Of organised
labor. For this reason It is predicted
that the new association will have the
antagonism Of the unions from the
very outset. Toresseing the probable
ain, of the new association, the Amer
lean Federation Of Labor, assembled
in annual convention in Boston last
month, gave extended attention to the
open shop issue and formulated a re-
port strongly opposing it. The action
Of the two organizations, one repre-
senting three-fourths of the organized
